form.formComment: Recent efforts have been impressive. Last start a big 3.5 m win when driven back in the field, (Fr4) held up early, at Narrabri (2:08.90) beating Tasmans Delight in NR up to 45 on April 12 at $3.80 at the bell was 6th-10.1. The ace draw can see her be right in the thick of things.

form.formComment: Recent form below what he is capable of. Last start was well back in the run when 8th (Fr4) over 2030m after showing early speed and racing wide at Newcastle beaten 23 m by Ohwhatiwouldgive (2:24.20) in NR up to 57 on April 10 at $17. The run previous 8th (Fr1) over 1609m at Menangle, beaten 30 m by Rocknroll Clarry (1:52.50) in 4yo+ NR up to 55 on March 27 at $34. Should get his chance from this draw.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Fr3) over 1609m at Newcastle, at the bell was 5th-4.49 beaten 12 m by Shark Dancer (1:54.80) in NR 51 to 54 on April 6 at $17. Two runs back was well beaten after breaking at Newcastle on December 20. May need more racing.
